ai-agent.description: Skills for orchestrating self-prompting and LLM tools.

backend.description: Server-side logic, routing, and schema definition.

code-review-pro.description: Perform deep architectural audits and code red-teaming to eliminate technical debt and security risks.

commit-sentinel.description: Act as the gateway for Git history health by auditing every commit for atomicity, type-safety, and conventional compliance.

context-distiller.description: Automate context packing and optimize agent memory to reduce token bloat and improve reasoning.

context-optimization.description: Enforce lean information exchange and maximize the signal-to-noise ratio in AI operations.

debugging.description: Methodical root-cause analysis and bug fixing.

dispatching-parallel-agents.description: Scale execution by delegating independent sub-tasks to specialized sub-agents.

docs-pro.description: Maintain Documentation as Code by tracking technical debt and synchronizing docs with logic.

executing-plans.description: Follow a previously established plan with strict adherence, avoiding distractions and scope creep.

finishing-a-development-branch.description: Safely finalize, clean up, and merge a completed body of work into the main integration branch.

fullstack.description: Bridging frontend and backend technologies seamlessly.

python-ecosystem.description: Environment detection, virtual environments, and validation for Python projects.

skill-creator.description: Empower the agent to design, draft, and implement new technical and operational skills.

systematic-debugging.description: Enforce a methodical workflow to identify and resolve bugs systematically.

test-driven-development.description: Ensure logic changes are driven and verified by automated tests.

typescript-ecosystem.description: Environment detection, package managers, and validation for TypeScript and JavaScript projects.

using-git-worktrees.description: Manage multiple active branches safely without destructive context-switching or stashing.

verification-before-completion.description: Ensure that no code change is considered finished until explicitly verified through type-checks, linters, and tests.

writing-plans.description: Establish a structured, step-by-step Execution Plan before writing any complex code.
